theme_strategy.toggle_mechanism: Sun/moon switch in the top header. Must persist user preference per device using localStorage.
theme_strategy.light_mode_vibe: Professional, clean, elegant, and editorial-inspired. Designed for corporate teams and office workers deciding on lunch spots. This is a polished daytime variant, NOT merely an inverted color scheme.
theme_strategy.dark_mode_vibe: The signature 'Grim Reaper' macabre aesthetic. This remains unchanged and acts as the default.

headings.usage: Editorial, elegant, Michelin-guide-style upscale restaurant feel. Maintains continuity with dark mode but feels like a high-end menu in light mode. Keep tracking normal or slightly tight.

body.usage: Clean, highly legible sans-serif for UI elements, distances, ratings, and filters.

header.light: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-200 text-zinc-900 shadow-sm
header.toggle_button: Interactive sun (light mode) / moon (dark mode) toggle icon. Add a subtle rotate and scale animation on hover/click.

chips_and_filters.light_unselected: bg-zinc-50 border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-600 hover:border-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-100 shadow-sm transition-colors
chips_and_filters.dark_unselected: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-200 transition-colors

primary_button.light: bg-[#A31621] text-white hover:bg-[#7F1D1D] rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-xl font-medium shadow-lg shadow-red-900/10 transform transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 active:scale-95
primary_button.dark: bg-[#E01E26] text-white hover:bg-[#DC2626] rounded-none border border-red-500 px-8 py-4 text-xl font-bold uppercase tracking-widest shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(224,30,38,0.3)] transition-all hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(224,30,38,0.6)]

reveal_treatment.light: A clean, professional 3D animated card flip (using Framer Motion rotateY 180deg). The back of the card features a high-quality restaurant photo filling the top half, with a crisp white bottom half displaying the Cormorant Garamond title, Manrope details, and soft bordered action buttons. No skeleton hands or macabre backgrounds.
reveal_treatment.dark: Full-screen shuffling-deck reveal with a skeleton hand holding a tarot card over the Reaper background.
reveal_treatment.animation_specs: Framer Motion spring physics for the flip: stiffness 100, damping 20, mass 1.

surfaces_and_elevation.light: Flat Solid surfaces. 1px light grey borders (#E4E4E7). Use shadow-sm for default cards, shadow-lg for floating elements like the result reveal card. Rounded corners (rounded-2xl) to soften the professional look.

layout_and_grids.spacing_strategy: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 for inner card padding. Keep the layout structure identical to the dark theme to ensure a seamless toggle, just swapping the stylistic properties.
layout_and_grids.reveal_card: Max width 28rem (max-w-md), auto margins for centering. Aspect ratio close to 2:3 or 3:4.

light_mode_restaurant_placeholder_1.description: Elegant bright restaurant interior with modern seating.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a robust ThemeProvider using React context that checks localStorage and prefers-color-scheme. Default to dark mode (the 'Grim Reaper' aesthetic) if no preference is found.
Apply Tailwind's 'dark:' variant strategy. The 'dark' class should be applied to the <html> or <body> element based on the theme state.

Use conditional rendering for text copy and structurally different animations (e.g., Skeleton Hand reveal vs. Clean Card Flip reveal). Example: `{theme === 'light' ? <CleanCardFlip /> : <MacabreTarotReveal />}`.
Keep Cormorant Garamond for headings and Manrope for body text across both themes.
Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, toggles, chips) have appropriate hover, focus, and active states. Use data-testid attributes universally for testing.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not apply universal transitions (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions to specific properties like color, background, transform, or opacity to prevent breaking 3D transforms.
Do not center-align the main app container via global CSS; maintain logical document flow.
Create depth through layered shadows and 1px borders, rather than muddy grey backgrounds.
Ensure a minimum 4.5:1 text contrast ratio for all text elements. Do not place light text over low-contrast backgrounds.
All interactive elements and key informational areas MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
